summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Terminal Translator landing page and TUI package functionality. All frontend features working correctly, TUI package properly installed with 76 patterns and sub-millisecond lookup performance.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with correct hero text 'Google Translate for Your Terminal'
Download button correctly detects and shows Linux OS in test environment
Also available for links properly show macOS and Windows options
Features section displays all 6 features: Real Terminal Integration, 70+ Built-in Patterns, AI Fallback, Beginner & Familiar Modes, Zero Configuration, Beautiful TUI
App preview shows split-pane interface with git command and Knowledge Base response
Knowledge base contains 76 patterns as expected
Sub-millisecond lookup times confirmed (0.024ms for test queries)
Package modules can be imported successfully
Knowledge base lookup functionality working with both beginner and familiar modes
